sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ العَامُ الدِّرَاسِيُّ الجَدِيدُ فِي شَهْرِ سَبْتَمْبَرَ.
sentences.translation: Nova školska godina počela je u septembru.
sentences.translationEn: The new school year started in September.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ الطُّلَّابُ بِمَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةٍ وَحَقَائِبَ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su došli s novom odjećom i novim torbama.
sentences.translationEn: The students came with new clothes and new bags.

sentences.translation: Bili su uzbuđeni što će sresti prijatelje i nastavnike.
sentences.translationEn: They were excited to meet their friends and teachers.

sentences.translation: Direktor je pozdravio učenike u dvorištu.
sentences.translationEn: The principal welcomed the students in the yard.

sentences.translation: Bio je to dan pun radosti i nade.
sentences.translationEn: It was a day full of joy and hope.
